slice_basis: Whether closed intervals that touch at an endpoint merge is a free definitional choice with no correct answer absent the spec; no amount of model knowledge resolves it — only an external hint (the #1154 exogenous arm) closes it.
omitted_edge: Whether touching intervals ([1,2],[2,3]) count as overlapping.
planted_defect: Strict-< overlap test leaves touching intervals separate.
disputed_note: N17 (abstention mechanism) recovered this slice (verifier NOTICES the ambiguity and abstains); the disconfirmation-mechanism run on #1637 MISSED it. The two seed datasets disagree on direction — the powered run adjudicates.
